title: Saro´s Easy Mining
description: You can define blocks in a config that can be mined with Shift+right-click and then replaced
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Mining_Mod/BH_SEMM_header.webp)

![over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Mining_Mod/BH_SEMM_overview.webp)

Saro's Easy Mining Mod simplifies the mining experience in Minecraft, allowing players to replace specific blocks with a simple right-click while holding Shift. Customize your block replacements easily via a configuration file, perfect for enhancing your survival or creative gameplay!

![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Mining_Mod/BH_SEMM_features.webp)

- **Block Replacement** 🔄
  - Replace specific blocks in the game with other blocks based on your configuration.
  - **Customizable Configurations** ⚙️
    - Easily define block replacements in the config file with a simple `block=replacement` format.

- **User-Friendly** 🌟
  - **Default Configuration** 📝
    - Comes pre-configured with examples replacements for easy setup.

- **Multiplayer and Survival Compatible** 🌐
  - Seamlessly integrates into both multiplayer and single-player survival environments.

![config](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Mining_Mod/BH_SEMM_config.webp)

- **Configuration File:** `config/saroseasymining-common.toml`
- **Example Configuration:**
  
  ```js
  // Block Replacement Settings
  [block_replacements]
    // List of blocks and their replacements in the format 'block=replacement'
    blockReplacements = ["minecraft:coal_ore=minecraft:cobblestone", 
                         "minecraft:iron_ore=minecraft:stone", 
                         "minecraft:diamond_ore=minecraft:gold_ore",
                         "minecraft:emerald_ore=minecraft:iron_ore",
                         "minecraft:redstone_ore=minecraft:lapis_ore"]

- **Usage:**
  - **Block Replacement:** Hold the Shift key and right-click on a block to replace it with the configured replacement block.


### Future Updates 🔜
- Stay tuned for more updates and additional features!

![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Mining_Mod/BH_SEMM_community.webp)
